note: Advisory sandbox linter. CHECK_OK/MISSING vocab, never PASS.
title: Skill-manifest self-linter
what_it_proves: extracts repo-relative path refs from each SKILL.md frontmatter and verifies existence
real skills: all referenced files exist -> CHECK_OK exit 0
seeded SKILL.md referencing a non-existent script -> caught
only the frontmatter block is scanned (body refs ignored)
red-run canary: extraction+existence discriminates (real refs all resolve)
chess_patches_applied: exits nonzero on any missing ref; RED-before-GREEN via canary
